center.name: 第二代罗斯柴尔德男爵沃尔特·罗斯柴尔德
center.summary: 第二代罗斯柴尔德男爵沃尔特·罗斯柴尔德是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Striated lorikeet、Doherty's bushshrike、蓝顶鹛鸫等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Doherty's bushshrike (Telophorus dohertyi) is a colourful but skulking species of bush-shrike of the family Malaconotidae which is found in forest habitats in north-central Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The slaty robin (Melanodryas cyanus), also known as the blue-grey robin, is a species of bird in the Australasian robin family Petroicidae

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The striated lorikeet (Charmosyna multistriata) is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae native to New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The splendid astrapia (Astrapia splendidissima) is a species of bird in the family Paradisaeidae, native to the montane forests of New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Sichuan leaf warbler (Phylloscopus forresti) is a species of leaf warbler found in central China

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Papuan parrotfinch (Erythrura papuana) is a common species of estrildid finch found in New Guinea
